Name: Legacy Auth Service Removal
Description: The legacy session-based authentication service must be decommissioned. All consumers must migrate to the OAuth 2.0 gateway before the deadline.
Action Required: Migrate all service-to-service calls to use JWT bearer tokens before Q2 cutover

Name: Database Schema Version Lock
Description: Applications directly querying internal schema tables must be refactored to use the public API layer.
Action Required: Replace direct table queries with approved REST API endpoints

Name: Deprecated Logging Library
Description: The log4j 1.x library has known CVEs and is no longer maintained. Upgrade to log4j 2.x or logback.
Action Required: Update dependency and test log output format compatibility

Name: Synchronous HTTP Client Removal
Description: All synchronous blocking HTTP clients must be replaced with async equivalents to prevent thread exhaustion under load.
Action Required: Refactor to use async HTTP client (httpx async or aiohttp)

Name: Hardcoded Configuration Values
Description: Environment-specific values hardcoded in source files should be externalised to configuration management.
Action Required: Extract to environment variables or secrets manager

Name: File System Storage Migration
Description: Local filesystem usage for persistent data storage must be migrated to object storage before infrastructure refresh.
Action Required: Migrate all file I/O to S3-compatible object storage API

Name: XML Configuration Parser
Description: Legacy XML-based configuration files are no longer supported in the new deployment platform.
Action Required: Convert XML configs to YAML/JSON format

Name: Batch Job Scheduler Upgrade
Description: The custom cron-based batch scheduler has known race conditions. Replace with the platform-standard job queue.
Action Required: Migrate batch jobs to the approved workflow orchestration system
